title: Peak Chat Mod
description: A mod that allows you to peek chat, just like essential! but for 1.21.5.
body:
This mod aims to allow you to open chat without opening the text, mainly useful while doing stuff and wanting to see chat. I just made this because i could not find anything like this for 1.21.5. Convinient. Neat.

The normal keybind is Z, but you can change it in the settings menu.
